input.hiring_signal_brief: Recent tweet: ‘We’re rebuilding our core ledger system from the ground up.’ No public team size or funding.
input.bench_summary: 2 backend engineers with distributed systems experience available in 10–14 days
input.pricing_policy: Flexible engagement: hourly or monthly, no long-term lock-in

candidate_output: Hi Derek, our backend engineers specialize in rebuilding core financial systems. We have two experts ready to jump in and help you ship faster. Let’s find a time to connect.
